user.title: Add stop or quay
user.description: Use an NSR stop ID (e.g. NSR:StopPlace:62356) for all platforms, or a specific quay ID (e.g. NSR:Quay:53118 or SKY:Quay:12010204).

error.invalid_stop_id: Invalid ID. Must start with NSR:StopPlace:, NSR:Quay: or SKY:Quay:
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Entur API. Please try again.
error.stop_not_found: No stop found with this ID.
